overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing nighttime driving through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk city. The player approaches and drives through the 'Impala Automatics' garage, passing an augmented guard, then continues through urban streets with towering concrete structures and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet curved city road with palm trees and futuristic skyline

agents.ego_description: driving along the wet curved road, navigating through foggy conditions with neon city lights visible in the distance

modern LED street lamps with long horizontal light bars
red warning light atop a tall structure visible through the fog
tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows
metal barrier with integrated lighting strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with first-person driving along a wet, curving asphalt road at night. Palm trees line the left side while modern LED streetlights illuminate the right. Through the fog, a red aviation beacon and distant neon-lit skyscrapers are visible, establishing the cyberpunk city atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy verge approaching vehicle service garage entrance

events.description: vehicle leaves the asphalt road and drives onto the grassy shoulder
approaching the Impala Automatics garage entrance with red neon signage

agents.ego_description: veering off the main road onto the grassy terrain, approaching the garage entrance where an augmented guard stands watch

notable_agents.action: heavily augmented character with cybernetic legs and weapon standing guard near the garage entrance

entered.detail: low-rise garage structure with dark facade and bright red neon signage
overgrown grassy area between the road and the building
industrial waste container with yellow lid
sloped concrete driveway leading into the garage

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the paved road and drives onto a grassy verge, approaching the 'Impala Automatics' garage. An augmented guard with visible cybernetic leg enhancements stands near the entrance. The environment transitions from structured road to overgrown terrain as the camera approaches the red-lit garage entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle service bay with intense red neon ceiling lighting

events.description: entering the covered garage space with red neon ceiling lights
passing close by the augmented guard standing near the entrance

agents.ego_description: driving into the garage interior, passing under rows of red neon ceiling lights and the augmented guard

notable_agents.action: augmented guard watching the vehicle pass by the entrance

entered.detail: grid of intense red fluorescent lights lining the garage ceiling
large blue commercial truck with 'KAUKAZ' logo parked inside
dark concrete walls with small windows

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Impala Automatics garage, immersing the view in intense red neon ceiling lighting. The space is a concrete service bay with a blue Kaukaz truck parked inside. The augmented guard is passed at the threshold as the vehicle moves through the sheltered interior toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with industrial structures and holographic advertisements

events.description: exiting the garage back to the outdoor city street
passing a large blue truck on the road
entering the covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: exiting the garage and navigating through city streets, passing under a massive concrete bridge with holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: large blue Kaukaz truck driving ahead on the road

entered.detail: enormous structural support column for the overpass
large illuminated advertisement screen showing dynamic imagery
massive elevated highway structure creating a covered corridor
large industrial building with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the garage, the vehicle returns to the foggy city streets, passing the blue Kaukaz truck. The environment features industrial warehouses and concrete barriers. The camera then drives beneath a massive concrete overpass with huge support pillars and holographic billboards lining the walls, creating a darker, more enclosed urban canyon atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a neon-lit coastal road through a red-lit industrial garage and into a claustrophobic urban canyon. It begins along a wet, curving asphalt road lined with palm trees and LED streetlights, with distant skyscrapers and a red aviation beacon shimmering through the fog. As the vehicle leaves the pavement for a grassy verge, the scene shifts toward the Impala Automatics garage, passing an augmented guard with cybernetic legs at the entrance. The camera then immerses itself in the intense red neon glow of the concrete service bay, gliding past a blue Kaukaz truck before exiting the sheltered interior. Finally, the environment opens back into the foggy city streets, passing industrial warehouses and concrete barriers before driving beneath a massive concrete overpass flanked by towering support pillars and holographic billboards.
